title: Spa Stix - Cosmetic 2.5-Spa-500 Wooden Makeup Spatulas (Pack of 500)
description:
Perfect for testing makeups
High Quality Cosmetic Stick
2. 5" Length
Made of Birchwood
Great quality
reviews_5s: Very pleased with this product. Great quality and pleased with the price. I purchased these because they are made of wood and environmentally friendly. Will purchase again in the future.Nice to have something that is not made of plastic!👍Parfait pour garder mes crèmes pour le visage saines sans microbes .
reviews_1s: It was not the same size as advertised on amazon I was very disappointed and I don’t know how to return the product cz I don’t need the tiny size of itIs not goodI ordered these for a brazilian wax. I had no idea they would be this small. Useless. Returned.
